title: orchis laxiflora lusus longebracteata
side_effects: Orchis laxiflora lusus longebracteata can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues like nausea and vomiting, as well as allergic reactions that may manifest as skin rashes and itching. In severe cases, improper use of the plant may also lead to cardiovascular problems, including high blood pressure and irregular heartbeat. Additionally, long-term misuse of Orchis laxiflora lusus longebracteata can result in kidney damage and decreased kidney function. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to avoid potential side effects.
